title: cryptotaenia flahaultii
intro: Cryptotaenia flahaultii, also known as Chinese celtuce or wok choy, is a type of leafy green vegetable that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Native to East Asia, this plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cryptotaenia flahaultii include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, soups, and salads, and can also be consumed as a raw or cooked vegetable.
